description_long: This is a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and a slightly curved, pointed beak. Its plumage is predominantly brown with subtle mottling and lighter speckles on the head and upper body, blending into a more uniform brown along the wings and tail. The bird's legs are slender and appear to be a muted brownish-gray, with visible claws. The tail is long and straight, tapering gently to a rounded tip, and the wings are held close to the body. The head is smoothly contoured, with the beak extending forward in a gentle arc. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for perching and foraging in urban or park environments.
description: A medium-sized, brown bird with a slightly curved beak, mottled head, and long, rounded tail. Its plumage is subtly speckled, and it has slender brownish-gray legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, curved beak, and mottled head with a long, straight tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the bird's narrow back, straight tail, and the alignment of its wings along the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same streamlined profile, curved beak, and subtle feather patterning.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the beak's curvature, the speckled head, and the symmetry of the bird's body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled and speckled with subtle gradients on head and upper body, more uniform brown on wings and tail
